data.title: The launch room checklist
data.subtitle: A compact square-format sequence for teams preparing a public release.

sections.headline: Choose the metric that tells you to stay or shift
sections.body: Every launch needs one live signal the team can interpret without a meeting.

sections.headline: Write the sentence customers should repeat
sections.body: If the audience cannot retell the value, the campaign is still carrying too much weight.

sections.headline: Prepare answers before the questions arrive
sections.body: Support, sales, and social should share the same source of truth before launch day.
